properties.label: Garland Type
properties.description: Selects the garland droop pattern. Type 0 is flat, types 1-4 create increasingly deep U-shaped sags between attachment points.

properties.label: Spacing
properties.description: Distance between garland rows as a percentage of the buffer size. Higher values spread the rows further apart.

properties.label: Cycles
properties.description: Number of times the garland animation cycles over the effect duration. Controls the speed of garland movement.

properties.label: Stack Direction
properties.description: Direction the garlands stack and move. The 'then' options reverse direction at the midpoint of the effect.
